long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs03.eq01.wdc02 et-4/0/13 <-> cbs01.tl01.atl01 et-0/0/49. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19795
close_notes: Multiple circuits flapped between cbs01.tl01.atl01 et-0/0/49, et-0/0/55, et-0/0/53, et-0/0/43 <-> cbs03.eq01.wdc02 et-4/0/13, et-6/0/13, et-2/0/13, et-0/0/13 and recovered without manual intervention.
